## What's wrong

- [ ] Link is dead (404 / DNS error)
- [ ] Paywalled now
- [ ] Information is out of date (e.g., visa rule changed, fees changed)
- [ ] Site no longer maintained

## Details

What you saw, when. If you have a replacement resource, link it here.
